headline: NRG Energy, Inc. (NRG) Reaffirms Earnings Guidance Despite Q1 Miss
summary: NRG Energy Inc. (NYSE:NRG) is one of the high growth utility stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 5, NRG Energy Inc. (NYSE:NRG) reiterated that demand for its product continues to grow despite a significant decrease in earnings in the first quarter. Net income fell by $625 million to $125 million, attributed to unrealized […]
